name: plain room
hints: A seemingly plain room, but the walls and floor hide secrets. Examine everything carefully.
LOOK ROOM reveals 3 odd walls and floor. KNOCK on walls - some sound hollow. LOOK WALL shows cracks and empty icon niches.
PUSH walls in different directions: PUSH EAST opens to dusty room, PUSH SOUTH to storeroom, PULL WEST to vacant room. PUSH DOWN falls to dragon's lair!
PUSH EAST (room 24), PUSH SOUTH (room 11, storeroom with star), PULL WEST (room 31, spells). PUSH DOWN (room 29, dragon's lair with star). PUSH WEST does nothing.

effects: Message: small cracks around edges & empty icon niches.

notes: A room with secret passages in every direction. PUSH/PULL walls to reveal hidden rooms: PUSH EAST (dusty room 24), PUSH SOUTH (storeroom 11), PULL WEST (vacant room 31), PUSH DOWN (dragon's lair 29). KNOCK confirms hollow walls. LOOK WALL shows cracks and icon niches. The most important puzzle hub in the castle. NORTH returns to courtyard (room 3).
